title: UFOs in Goiânia-Go were observed and detected by pilots and air traffic controllers [1980]
excerpt: FEB 19th, 1980. Time: 19:00. An operator working for the Control Tower at the Airport of Goiânia, State of Goiás, reported that “he saw a light in his eastern sector” deciding to ask the ACC-BS [Brasilia-DF Approach Control Center] to investigate “if there was any traffic there to inform him”. text_preview: FEB 19th, 1980. Time: 19:00. An operator working for the Control Tower at the Airport of Goiânia, State of Goiás, reported that “he saw a light in his eastern sector” deciding to ask the ACC-BS [Brasilia-DF Approach Control Center] to investigate “if there was any traffic there to inform him”. Responding to the question from the TWR-GO operator, the ACC-BS reported that there was no traffic there. Then, the operator “started to see two more lights in that same sector, close to the Goianápolis position”. After this second sighting, the TWR-GO operator contacted the Tower of Anápolis-GO to infor
summary: Multiple UFOs observed visually and on radar by control tower operators and VASP pilots over Goiânia-GO on Feb 19, 1980; two F-103 fighters placed on alert.
